key_takeaway: Big Easy Management runs 175 short-term rentals in New Orleans — one of the most dynamic STR markets in the US. Boom gives you the automation and pricing intelligence to maximize revenue across your portfolio while cutting manual work in half.
summary_bullets: 175 properties in a high-demand, event-driven market like New Orleans means your pricing needs to move fast — Boom's dynamic pricing engine adjusts rates in real-time based on local events, demand spikes, and competitor data
Guest communication across 175 listings is a full-time job — Boom's AI-powered unified inbox handles routine messages automatically while keeping your personal touch
At your scale, consolidating your tech stack into one platform means fewer handoffs, fewer errors, and a team that can focus on guest experience instead of admin

discussion_points.title: Running 175 Properties in New Orleans
items: New Orleans is event-driven (Mardi Gras, Jazz Fest, Saints games) — pricing needs to be hyper-responsive to demand swings
Managing guest communication across Airbnb, VRBO, Booking.com, and direct channels at scale
Coordinating cleaning and turnover for 175 units with tight same-day check-in/check-out windows
Staying compliant with New Orleans' evolving STR regulations
Owner satisfaction — providing transparent reporting and maximizing returns

discussion_points.title: How Boom Addresses This
items: Event-aware dynamic pricing — rates automatically spike for Mardi Gras, adjust for slow midweek periods, and optimize minimum stays
Unified inbox with AI auto-responses — BAM handles guest questions 24/7, escalating only what needs human attention
Automated task management — turnover tasks auto-create and assign based on your check-in/check-out calendar
Compliance tools and automated guest screening built into the workflow
Real-time owner portal with revenue dashboards, payout tracking, and automated monthly statements

discussion_points.title: Growth Opportunities
items: Direct booking website — reduce OTA commissions on your 175-property portfolio
AI-powered upsells — offer early check-in, late checkout, and New Orleans experience packages
Scale your portfolio without scaling headcount — operators using Boom grow 30-40% faster than their teams

demo_highlights.benefit: Event-aware pricing across all 175 listings. Mardi Gras rates set themselves. Jazz Fest minimums auto-adjust. No manual spreadsheet work.
Every guest message in one place. BAM answers routine questions instantly — check-in instructions, parking info, restaurant recs — while you handle the exceptions.
Turnover tasks auto-create from your booking calendar. Your cleaning crew sees exactly what needs to happen and when. No group texts, no missed turnovers.
Your property owners see real-time performance data. Less time on owner calls, more time growing the business.

next_steps.action: Book a 30-minute discovery call to explore how Boom fits your workflow
Prepare a custom demo focused on your New Orleans portfolio
